description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat, overhanging roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a slightly raised platform. The front facade features a covered porch supported by slender posts, with a small set of steps leading up to the entrance. The exterior walls are smooth and painted white, with a single window visible on the front and side elevations. The property is surrounded by a simple, grassy yard with a single stylized tree positioned near the house. The roof extends significantly beyond the main structure, providing ample shade to the porch area. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat overhanging roof, white exterior, and a covered front porch set in a grassy yard with a tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide overhanging roof, covered porch, single window, and steps leading up to the entrance.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the porch area, steps, and the tree positioned to the right of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the tree close to the structure, and the extended roofline.
description_view_3: Side view showing the plain wall with no windows or doors and the tree on the left side of the yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with single front and side windows
